pm_tasks.title: Implement user authentication flow
pm_tasks.description: Build the complete OAuth 2.0 + PKCE authentication flow including login, registration, password reset, and session management.
pm_tasks.acceptance_criteria: Users can register, login, reset passwords. Sessions expire after 24h. Refresh tokens work correctly. All auth endpoints have rate limiting.

pm_tasks.title: Fix memory leak in WebSocket connection pool
pm_tasks.description: Production monitoring shows gradual memory increase in the WebSocket service. Connections are not being properly cleaned up on client disconnect.
pm_tasks.acceptance_criteria: Memory usage remains stable under sustained load. No orphaned connections after 1 hour of operation. Load test passes with 10k concurrent connections.

pm_tasks.title: Design dashboard analytics page
pm_tasks.description: Create the UI design for the main analytics dashboard showing key metrics, charts, and filters. Must support responsive layout for tablet and desktop.
pm_tasks.acceptance_criteria: Figma mockups approved by product. Responsive breakpoints defined. Component library updated. Design system tokens documented.

pm_tasks.title: Upgrade PostgreSQL driver to v5.x
pm_tasks.description: Upgrade the database driver from v4.x to v5.x for improved connection pooling and prepared statement caching. Includes migration of all query builders.
pm_tasks.acceptance_criteria: All integration tests pass. No performance regression. Connection pool metrics stable. Zero downtime during rollout.

pm_tasks.title: Investigate API latency spike on /search endpoint
pm_tasks.description: P95 latency on the search endpoint jumped from 120ms to 450ms after the last deploy. Need to identify root cause and recommend a fix.
pm_tasks.acceptance_criteria: Root cause identified and documented. Proposed fix with estimated effort. Performance benchmark results before and after.

pm_tasks.title: Add export to CSV for all data tables
pm_tasks.description: Users need the ability to export any data table view to CSV format. Should respect current filters and column selections.
pm_tasks.acceptance_criteria: Export button visible on all table views. CSV includes applied filters. Handles 100k+ rows without browser crash. UTF-8 encoding.

pm_tasks.title: Set up automated dependency vulnerability scanning
pm_tasks.description: Configure GitHub Dependabot and Snyk integration for automated security scanning of all project dependencies. Set up alerts and auto-PR generation.
pm_tasks.acceptance_criteria: Dependabot enabled on all repos. Snyk dashboard configured. Critical vulnerabilities trigger Slack alerts. Weekly summary report generated.

pm_milestones.name: MVP Launch
pm_milestones.description: Minimum viable product with core features: auth, data management, basic analytics, and API access. Ready for beta users.

pm_milestones.name: Public Beta
pm_milestones.description: Feature-complete beta with analytics dashboard, team collaboration, export capabilities, and webhook integrations.

pm_milestones.name: GA Release
pm_milestones.description: General availability with SOC 2 readiness, SLA guarantees, enterprise SSO, and production-grade monitoring.

pm_milestones.name: Performance Optimization Phase
pm_milestones.description: Sub-100ms P95 latency on all critical paths. Database query optimization, caching layer, and CDN configuration.

pm_milestones.name: Security Hardening
pm_milestones.description: Complete security audit, penetration testing, dependency scanning, and compliance documentation for enterprise customers.

pm_sprints.name: Sprint 13
pm_sprints.goal: Complete core authentication and authorization framework

pm_sprints.name: Sprint 14
pm_sprints.goal: Ship MVP data management features and admin panel

pm_sprints.name: Sprint 15
pm_sprints.goal: Build analytics dashboard foundation and resolve critical bugs

pm_sprints.name: Sprint 16
pm_sprints.goal: Complete export features and begin webhook integration

pm_sprints.name: Sprint 17
pm_sprints.goal: Team collaboration features and notification system

pm_risks.title: Third-party API rate limiting may block real-time sync
pm_risks.description: The external data provider limits API calls to 100/min. At projected user growth, we may hit this limit within 6 weeks, causing data sync delays.
pm_risks.mitigation_plan: Implement request batching and local caching layer. Negotiate higher rate limits with provider. Build fallback to webhook-based sync.

pm_risks.title: Key engineer departure risk
pm_risks.description: Two senior engineers have single-person knowledge of critical subsystems (auth and data pipeline). No documentation or cross-training exists.
pm_risks.mitigation_plan: Schedule knowledge transfer sessions. Create architecture decision records (ADRs). Pair program on critical paths. Document all runbooks.

pm_risks.title: PostgreSQL performance degradation at scale
pm_risks.description: Current query patterns may not scale beyond 1M records per table. No load testing has been done at projected 6-month data volumes.
pm_risks.mitigation_plan: Run load tests at 10x current volume. Identify slow queries. Add read replicas and connection pooling. Consider partitioning large tables.

pm_risks.title: Scope creep from enterprise customer requests
pm_risks.description: Three enterprise prospects have requested custom features that would add 4-6 weeks to the GA timeline. Sales pressure to accommodate.
pm_risks.mitigation_plan: Create feature request intake process. Prioritize against roadmap. Offer professional services for custom work. Protect core team capacity.

pm_risks.title: CI/CD pipeline reliability issues
pm_risks.description: Build pipeline fails approximately 8% of the time due to flaky integration tests and Docker registry timeouts. Slows developer productivity.
pm_risks.mitigation_plan: Quarantine flaky tests. Add retry logic for registry pulls. Implement test parallelization. Monitor build success rate weekly.
